title: Inoty's Steamwork Mace
description: Adds Steamwork's Rendition of The Mace to vanilla Minecraft as a texture pack! (With some extra stuff ontop!)
body:
![Mace Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ed31b95bd2e98d07211a897e9baa7e67a1a79b.png)


## **What does this do?**
Adds Steamworks Mace into Vanilla Minecraft Using Resource Packs!
Also adds a bunch of cool easter eggs in the form of Custom Name Textures!
Has a variant for pretty much every endgame material in Steamwork, along with some other fun suprises!

## **FAQ**
### 1. Will there be more versions of this?
Probably, I do plan to add more mace variants in the future!
### 2. Why don't the custom maces work?
You need version 1.21.5 and above for those.
### 3. What the hell is Steamwork?
You'll find out soon enough, feel free to join the discord for updates :)
### 4. When is Steamwork coming out?
The goal is summer 2026, but no garantee.


## **Image of all the Maces!**


![All the Custom Maces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1345997503f8de97799e2a13a9931042f0fb1f1e.png)
